inputs.label: Grade Level
inputs.name: grade_level
inputs.description: The grade level for which the rubric is being created

inputs.label: Point Scale
inputs.name: point_scale
inputs.description: The number of performance levels in the rubric (typically 3-6)

inputs.label: Standards/Objectives
inputs.name: objectives
inputs.description: The learning standards or objectives for the assignment

inputs.label: Additional Customization
inputs.name: additional_customization
inputs.description: Any additional customization or specific requirements for the rubric

inputs.label: Standards/Objectives File URL
inputs.name: objectives_file_url
inputs.description: URL to a file containing standards/objectives (CSV, PDF, DOCX, PPT, TXT, YouTube, Website, Google Sheets)

inputs.label: Standards/Objectives File Type
inputs.name: objectives_file_type
inputs.description: Type of the file (csv, pdf, docx, pptx, txt, youtube, website, gsheet)

inputs.label: Assignment Description File URL
inputs.name: assignment_description_file_url
inputs.description: URL to a file containing assignment description (CSV, PDF, DOCX, PPT, TXT, YouTube, Website, Google Sheets)

inputs.label: Assignment Description File Type
inputs.name: assignment_description_file_type
inputs.description: Type of the file (csv, pdf, docx, pptx, txt, youtube, website, gsheet)

inputs.label: Language
inputs.name: lang
inputs.description: Language code for the rubric (e.g., en, es, fr)
